span.p:
split: old | last 4 messages
(+ cut repair for tool pairs)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
summary call — same provider,
note-taker prompt, NO tools

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
new history: summary message
+ recent 4 (roles merged)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
emit compaction event
(JSONL is NEVER rewritten)
